info.name: Ghana SHS LMS REST API
info.description:
Ghana Senior High School Learning Management System REST API Collection

Last Updated: March 8, 2026
Total Endpoints: 240+

🔒 UUID SECURITY UPDATE (March 3, 2026):
API now uses UUIDs instead of integer IDs for enhanced security.
- UUIDs prevent ID enumeration attacks
- UUID variables: student_uuid, teacher_uuid, user_uuid, institution_uuid, class_uuid, subject_uuid, assignment_uuid, message_uuid, notification_uuid, announcement_uuid, event_uuid, grade_report_uuid, course_content_uuid
- Integer ID variables (unchanged): course_id, assessment_id, parent_id, role_id, etc.
- Setup scripts automatically retrieve UUIDs and populate collection variables

IMPORTANT SETUP STEPS:
1. Import database_lms_api.sql to create the database schema
2. Run setup.sql to create sample data (Accra SHS)
3. Use the 'Setup & Configuration' folder to retrieve UUIDs
4. Update collection variables with the retrieved UUIDs (done automatically by setup scripts)
5. Login to get access token (saved automatically)

DEFAULT CREDENTIALS (from setup.sql):
- Super Admin: superadmin / password
- Admin: admin / password
- Teacher: kofi.mensah / password
- Teacher: ama.asante / password
- Student: kwame.osei / password
- Student: abena.adjei / password

NEW API SECTIONS (March 2026):
- Events & Calendar (9 endpoints)
- Grade Reports & Transcripts (11 endpoints)
- User Activity & Audit Trail (10 endpoints)
- Course Content & Lesson Plans (9 endpoints)
- Subscriptions & Billing (10 endpoints)
- File Upload (4 endpoints)
- Superadmin Activity & Audit Trail (10 endpoints)

}

item.name: Course Content & Lesson Plans
item.description: Lesson plans, course materials, and content management for teachers

query.description: lesson, module, unit, topic, video, document, quiz, assignment

item.name: Admin Activity & Audit Trail
item.description: Institution-level activity log for admins only. Tracks student_enrolled, teacher_added, class_created, login, update, delete and other institution-wide events with info/warning/critical severity.

body.raw:
{
  "activity_type": "student_enrolled",
  "description": "Enrolled student Kwame Osei into Form 1A",
  "entity_type": "student",
  "entity_id": 1,
  "meta": "Kwame Osei",
  "severity": "info"
}

item.name: Superadmin Activity & Audit Trail
item.description: Platform-level activity log for super admins only. Tracks institution_created, admin_created, backup, security, login, and other system-wide events with info/warning/critical severity.
